title: polemonium carneum subsp. genuinum
intro: Polemonium carneum subsp. genuinum, also known as Clark's polemonium, is a flowering plant belonging to the family Polemoniaceae, and it is native to the western United States. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Polemonium carneum subsp. genuinum include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. Traditionally, herbal preparations of this plant are made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
